description: Brand contract for the Demeter editorial-tier starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Editorial tier selector supports compare/current, unit-plus-total, savings, and full-price modes through price_display_variant and SDK data-next displays.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: Editorial tier selector with .os-card cards and data-next-bundle-card anchors.
family_inventory.order_bump: Side-summary bump variants use bump-check01.html or bump-switch01.html and data-next-package-toggle anchors.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Upsell offer includes use upsell_offer or upsell_bundle_tiers with a visible price row above the accept CTA.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.
